features: PROFESSIONAL: Mehron’s Paradise Makeup AQ Face & Body Paint is a premium quality, water-activated makeup that offers intense color payoff and is easy to blend. True professional grade, trusted by Hollywood and Broadway pros since 1927.
INFUSED: Infused with skin-soothing ingredients like Aloe, Avocado Oil, Cucumber, Lemongrass, and Cocoa Seed Butter. Its highly pigmented colors give a vibrant result every time.
MULTIPLE COLORS: Available in a variety of matte finish collections, including Basics, Pastels, Tropicals, and Metallic shades, this makeup offers a kaleidoscope of colors and finishes.

WATER ACTIVATED: Paradise’s water-activated formula can be customized to your desired consistency, making it ideal for creating a wide range of looks, from subtle accents to bold and dramatic designs.

ABOUT MEHRON: For over 95 years, Mehron has been an industry-leading, professional makeup company with a passion for inspiring creativity. Mehron’s award-winning cosmetics and special FX products are used in most stage and film performances in Hollywood, on Broadway, and by artists across the globe. Mehron has been trusted by professionals since 1927 for having the highest safety, performance, and quality standards. Mehron products are made in the USA & always cruelty-free.
description: Product description Mehron Makeup Paradise Makeup AQ Face & Body Paint is a premium water-activated makeup that is designed to provide professional results. Its formula includes a unique blend of skin-soothing ingredients such as Aloe, Avocado Oil, Cucumber, Lemongrass, and Cocoa Seed Butter. The intense color payoff and ease of blending make it ideal for creating intricate and vibrant designs on both the face and body. With a wide variety of matte finish collections to choose from, including Basics, Pastels, Tropicals, and Metallic shades, this makeup provides a kaleidoscope of colors and finishes to suit every taste and occasion. Not only does it offer stunning colors and long-lasting wear, but it's also made in the USA with the highest quality ingredients. It is no wonder that award-winning artists around the world consider Mehron Makeup’s Paradise Makeup AQ Face & Body Paint to be their go-to choice for achieving outstanding results. Directions To activate, add a small amount of water. Mix the cake surface into a spreadable cream to desired consistency. The Barrier Spray can be used to remain water resistant. To remove, lather with soap and rinse with water.

specifications_table.Benefits: Provides vibrant and long-lasting colors for body art while being gentle on the skin
